ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the metric belongs to */,
  "avg_ticker_price" REAL /* Average ticker price at hour 0 */,
  "avg_danbot_score" REAL /* Average DanBot score at hour 0 */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio */,
  "calmar_ratio" REAL /* Calmar ratio */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value at risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_gains" (
  "gain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gain calculation */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the gain calculation belongs to */,
  "avg_1hr_gain" REAL /* Average 1-hour gain */,
  "avg_24hr_gain" REAL /* Average 24-hour gain */,
  "count_of_positions" INTEGER /* Count of positions */,
  "sum_of_24hr_gains" REAL /* Sum of 24-hour gains */,
  "std_dev_of_24hr_gains" REAL /* Standard deviation of 24-hour gains */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Recovery time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_gains_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the stock belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "allocation" REAL /* Allocation of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "buy_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was bought */,
  "sell_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividend amount of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the metric belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the risk model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_optimization" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being optimized */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk model used for optimization */,
  "allocation" REAL /* Optimized allocation of the portfolio */,
  "optimization_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was optimized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_optimization_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_optimization_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "components" TEXT /* Components of the market index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the data belongs to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data from the external source */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)
